submitted_payload.description: Ralph Workflow is a free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for ambitious software work. It composes planning, implementation, and verification into a repo-native workflow so longer coding runs end in reviewable, tested output instead of another confident summary.

why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is still flat, so a fresh third-party developer-facing directory is higher leverage than more internal packet churn.
AI Tools Magic exposes a live public submission path via a Formspree endpoint without login or CAPTCHA from this runtime.
This target was not present in outreach-log.md, so it expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The submission uses Codeberg as the primary destination and preserves GitHub as the mirror only.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a new directory listing that points directly to the Codeberg primary repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live AI Tools Magic listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending only and shift the next fresh-action slot to another untouched developer-facing directory with an executable public submit path.
